description: Lis Pendens and Court Orders — records notices of pending litigation, court-ordered transfers, foreclosure notices, and abstracts of judgment against real property

hard_stops.label: Court Case Number Not Verified
hard_stops.logic: Court case number cannot be verified against the issuing court's records — document may be fraudulent

hard_stops.label: Court Order Missing Judge Signature
hard_stops.logic: Court order does not bear the signature of the issuing judge or judicial officer — order is not executable

hard_stops.label: Expungement Order — Do Not Record
hard_stops.logic: An expungement or withdrawal order has been issued for this lis pendens — original notice must be removed, not re-recorded

soft_flags.label: Foreclosure Notice — Homeowner Notification Required
soft_flags.logic: Foreclosure-related document being recorded — jurisdiction may require additional homeowner counseling notifications
